name: roll-parser
description: High-performance dice notation parser for tabletop RPGs. TypeScript-first, Bun-optimized.
author: Mikita Taukachou <edloidas@gmail.com> (https://edloidas.com)

scripts.check: bun typecheck && bun lint && bun format:check
scripts.check:fix: bun typecheck && bun lint:fix && bun format
scripts.build: bun run clean && bun run build:esm && bun run build:cjs && bun run build:esm:testing && bun run build:cjs:testing && bun run build:cli && bun run build:types
scripts.test:node: node -e "import('./dist/index.mjs').then(m => { const r = m.roll('1d6'); if (!(r.total >= 1 && r.total <= 6)) throw new Error('ESM smoke failed: total=' + r.total); console.log('Node.js ESM smoke: ok'); })" && node -e "const m = require('./dist/index.js'); const r = m.roll('1d6'); if (!(r.total >= 1 && r.total <= 6)) throw new Error('CJS smoke failed: total=' + r.total); console.log('Node.js CJS smoke: ok');"
scripts.validate: bun run check && bun run build && bun test:ci
scripts.release:dry: bun run check && bun run build && bun test
